name: Guided mountain bike tour in Zermatt private
description: Discover Guided mountain bike tour in Zermatt private in Switzerland.
longDescription: Discover Guided mountain bike tour in Zermatt private in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Mountain bike
subcategory.description: Rent your mountain bike here or book a guided tour with a professional guide. Ride up the mountain on one side and down the other: Why toil in a stuffy gym? You can accomplish the same thing much more pleasantly in wonderful natural surroundings in the fresh air. Whether you prefer a more strenuous tour in the mountains with a conventional mountain bike or a more relaxed outing with the support of an e-mountain bike is entirely up to you.

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online
